name: Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tomatoes and cucumber, then cut into small cubes.
2. Chop the onion and green pepper, and mix with the cubed vegetables. Reserve half of this mixture aside and chill.
3. In a blender, blend all ingredients except garlic, olive oil, bread, and chives for 1 minute, then chill.
4. Cut the bread into 1/4-inch cubes. Place in a skillet with garlic and sauté.
5. Add oil to the skillet and cook until the garlic is crushed. Then add the remaining garlic to the chilled soup.
6. Serve individual servings, topped with cubed chives and croutons.
